message:
test(core): add property-based tests for tail-latency controller (ft-2p9cb.3.5.3)

10 proptests: wakeup conservation, max nondecreasing, p50<=p99<=max,
distribution sum, violation rate bounded, batch sum, reset zeroes,
strategy/degradation serde roundtrips.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
